extensionDescription.message: Open source prompt manager with cross-AI platform prompt management, prompt generation, prompt marketplace and more. Supports 20 AI platforms including ChatGPT, Gemini, Doubao, Qwen, etc.

promptContent.message: Enter your prompt here - Use #variable# to set dynamic values.

otherSettings.message: Other settings can be found when using AI assistants.

shortcutsAvailable.message: These shortcuts are available on any page supported by the extension.

addAIAssistants.message: Add your supported AI assistants below to get started.

v2Released.message: Although I don't do this often, I'm excited to share that V2 is finally released! It brings new features and improvements, and lays the foundation for some cool features.

copyPaste.message: Copy and paste from sidebar and right-click menu.

appendPromptSetting.message: New setting: Append prompt to input box.

betterThanEver.message: Now looks better than ever, supports light and dark modes.

permissionManagement.message: Permission management is available through the

permissionManagementEnd.message: in the bottom right of the sidebar.

thankYou.message: For many users who have supported, shared feedback, and used this extension, I'd like to take this opportunity to say

leaveReview.message: Welcome to leave a review for

optionalPermissions.message: Optional permissions, hot corner mode, sidebar!

exploreFeaturesCaption.message: Hot corner mode, prompt variables, right-click menu, organize prompts, export and import...

advancedFeaturesSubtitle.message: Prompt variables, tags, search, append prompts, easy import.

simpleEasySubtitle.message: User-friendly, light/dark mode, hot corner mode.
